raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet juhs ne stahweet kluﬀ-
fu/ dsenneetees juhſeem Eenaid-
neekeem pakkat/ un kanjeet win-
no Pakkalejus / ne leezeet tohs
ſawôs Pilssahtôs nahkt / jo tas
KUNGS juhjo Deews irr tohs
juhtâs Rohkâs nodewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Josuiis/ un tee I-
sraêta Behrni bija betgufschi ar
tohti leeln Kaufchanu tohs kaut/
teekanis tee iſdeldeți bija/ un kad
tee atliſkuschi no teem ſtiprôs
Pilssahtôs nahkuschi bija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atgreeſahs wiſti Lau-
dis us Josuii Lehgeri pee Ma-
kedas ar Meeru / ne weens bija
prett teem Israêta Behrneem fa-
wu Mehli kuſtinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to fazziia Josuiis :
Atdarrajt tahs Alias Zaurumn/
un iſweddeet ſchohs pee Keh-
ninus no tahs Alias pee maſtim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee tad darrija ta/ un iſ-
wedde no tahs Alias pee winna
tohs peež Kehninus/ to Kehninu
no Jeruſalemeg/ to Kehninu no
Cebroṇa/ to Kehninu no Jarmu-
tes / to Kehninu no Laheſa/ to
Kehninu no Eglona.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee bija ſchohs Keh-
ninus pee Josuiis iſwedduſchi /
tad aizinaja Josuiis wiſius Isra-
etâ Wihruß/ un fazziia us to
Rarra-Wihru Wirſneekeem/ kas
ar winnu bija gahjuſchi : Bee-
eite klaht/ minneet ar Kahjahm
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuûs fazziia us
teeim: Ne bihſteetees/ un ne bai-
lojeetees/ effeet ſtripri/ un turrajt
drohſchu Prahtu/ jo ta patt dar-
rihs tas KUNGS wiſſeem juh-
ſeem Eenaidneekeem / prett kam
juhs farrojat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Josuûs kawe winnuß
pehz to/ un nokawe tohs/ un uhs-
fahre tohs pee peez Kohkeem/ un
tee bija pee Kohkeem pakahrți
lihds Wakkaram.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ap to Laiku / kad ta
Saule no-eet/ pawehleja Josuûs/
ka tee no Kohkeem nonemti tap-
tu/ un tee nomette tohs tai Alla-
eekſch ka tee bija apflehpuſchees/
un likke leelus Akminus preekſch
tahs Alias Zauruma/(kas tu-
irr) lihds ſchaf paſchat Deenai.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai paſchâ Deenâ uhs-
jehme arridsan Josuûs Makedu-
nn kawe to ar Sohbina Afmini/
wiſsch arridsan iſdeldeja winnas
Kehninu / winnas/ un wiſſae
Dwebfeles / kas eekſch tahs bija/
wiſsch ne affizzinaja ne weenu
pahri/ un darrija tam Kehninam
no Makedas/ ittin ka wiſsch tai
Kehninam no Jerikus bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pahrzehlahs Josuûs/
un wiſs Israêls ar winnu na
Makedas us Libnu/ un farroja
prett Libnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS nodeve
to arridsan Israêta Rohka a
winnas Kehninu/ un wiſsch la
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
